BP 344: Accessibility Law

Transportation Facilities

Game Mode
  • Pathways & Corridors: Min. Width
  • Pathways & Corridors: Min. Unobstructed Clearance
  • Controlled Passage: Min. Width
  • Automatic Doors
  • Platform Screen Doors: Min. Clear Width
  • Tactile Floor Surfaces at Platform Screen Doors
  • Elevators: Min. Car Depth & Width
  • Elevators: Min. Clear Door Opening
  • Respite Area: Max. Distance
Code Reference

E. SPECIAL TYPES OF FACILITIES
5. Transportation Facilities
5.7. Respite Area
a. Respite Areas shall be provided at every thirty (30) meters or less along the passenger path leading up to the final space prior to boarding in all modes of transportation. These areas shall be properly marked for easy recognition, and priority seating shall be given to Persons with Disabilities.
